nasb.text: We inform the king that if that city is rebuilt and the walls finished, as a result you will have no possession in the province beyond the River.”

esv.text: We make known to the king that if this city is rebuilt and its walls finished, you will then have no possession in the province Beyond the River.”

cnv.text: 我們告知王，如果這城建成，牆垣築好，河西那邊的地方就不再是王的了。”

ccb.text: 我们愿王知道，这城一旦建好，城墙完工，幼发拉底河西之地就不再为王所有了。’”
